svg.title: UML Class Diagram (Iteration 5) - Battery Support Added

g.text: UML Class Diagram (Iteration 5) - Battery Support Added
+FireZone(id: int, x1: int, y1: int, x2: int, y2: int)
+FireEvent(time: String, zoneId: int, type: String, severity: String, centerX: int, centerY: int, faultType: FaultType)
-handleMessage(msg: String, sender: InetAddress, port: int): void
-handleReady(msg: String, sender: InetAddress, port: int): void
-send(msg: String, addr: InetAddress, port: int): void
-moveTo(targetX: int, targetY: int, event: FireEvent): boolean
+updateDronePosition(droneId: int, x: int, y: int): void
+setZoneOnFire(zoneId: int, onFire: boolean, severity: String): void
+updateDronePosition(droneId: int, x: int, y: int): void
+setZoneOnFire(zoneId: int, onFire: boolean, severity: String): void
+log(subsystem: String, event: String, details: String): void
Sends battery level with every status update
Sends zones and events to Scheduler
- NOZZLE_FAULT: Hard fault, drone marked OFFLINE
- CORRUPTED_MESSAGE: Malformed UDP packet, drone marked OFFLINE
Fault cleared on requeue for reassignment to another drone
- FAULTED: Hard fault (nozzle failure, corrupted message)
- SOFT_FAULTED: Temporary delay (stuck in flight) - expected to recover automatically
Battery is refilled to 100% when drone returns to base
BATTERY_LOW: Returns to base when not enough battery% to return from current position
- Average response time (fire detection to arrival)
- Total time to extinguish all fires
- Per-drone flight time, idle time, distance traveled
